Challenge
Full Moon Totem

Once in a while when the unit is silenced, they remove all silencing effects from themself and cast restoration. The unit removes a random debuff and restores 250000 health. Also, the unit's damage is increased by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90
